errors.description: The RFC3161 preflight request is missing a canonical proof bundle hash.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny timestamp preflight until proof bundle hash continuity is present

errors.description: The RFC3161 preflight request is missing a canonical timestamp anchor hash.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny timestamp preflight until local timestamp anchor continuity is present

errors.description: The RFC3161 preflight request material is malformed or digest verification failed.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny timestamp preflight until canonical request material is valid

errors.description: The RFC3161 preflight nonce is missing or malformed.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny timestamp preflight until nonce format is deterministic and valid

errors.description: The RFC3161 preflight request contains unsafe diagnostics or redaction-sensitive material.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny timestamp preflight until request material contains no secrets or raw approvals

errors.description: The RFC3161 preflight request claims or contains TSA response state that is not verified.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny timestamp preflight because live TSA response verification is not enabled yet
